delta.comment: DEFERRED 2026-07-09 (autonomous run): operator directive 'remove model_routing tier binding as it is not used' is CONTRADICTED by evidence. Runtime-unused CONFIRMED (0 refs in src/autoharness/ and tests/), BUT install-time load-bearing: install-harness SKILL resolves 21 vars (MODEL_ROUTING_TIER1..3, TIER_*_FAMILY/PROVIDER/REASONING_EFFORT, ORCHESTRATOR_*, ALT_*) from it and shipped P-013 orchestrator routing depends on it (config.yaml:57-61, templates/harness-config.yaml.tmpl:64-84, schemas/harness-config.schema.json:156-181 + 1.0.0.schema.json:177-180). Naive removal regresses P-013 with NO named replacement. Judged UNSAFE to execute without operator input. Safe path: operator picks Option A (remove + named replacement binding), B (rename to model_tiers preserving install resolution), or C (keep); then execute cross-cutting change with schema-skew reconciliation (unversioned oneOf[string,object] vs 1.0.0 plain strings).
